headlines.title: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
headlines.summary: The city's governor urges residents to remain indoors for the first time since the beginning of the war.

headlines.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
headlines.summary: The US military says it struck Iranian drones and radar sites. Tehran responds by targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

headlines.title: Air raid sirens in Bahrain as Iranian missiles and drones head for Gulf neighbors
headlines.summary: Escalating tensions in the Gulf region as Iran targets US allies.

headlines.title: Iran says staff blocked from entering US after players given World Cup visas
headlines.summary: Iranian officials say technical staff have been denied visas, hours after the US said players could enter the country.

headlines.title: More than 6,000 people protest in Seoul over election ballot shortage
headlines.summary: Protesters demand local elections be repeated after a shortage of ballots prevented some people from voting.

headlines.title: Armenia braces for election as Russia piles pressure on pro-West government
headlines.summary: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.

headlines.title: Lebanon says three soldiers killed in Israeli attack on car
headlines.summary: The Israeli military is investigating the incident in south Lebanon, where it is fighting Hezbollah.

headlines.title: More than half of Latin Americans deported from US to Congo are now back home
headlines.summary: Deportation reversal follows international outcry over flights to conflict zone.

headlines.title: A federal judge strikes down Trump administration immigration policy affecting 39 countries
headlines.summary: Court ruling impacts immigration restrictions on dozens of nations.

headlines.title: SpaceX website and IPO documents inaccessible in Hong Kong and mainland China
headlines.summary: Step threatens to curb participation by Chinese investors in expected record-breaking IPO.
